indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX readings_pkey ON public.readings USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX readings_firing_id_idx ON public.readings USING btree (firing_id)
CREATE INDEX readings_timestamp_idx ON public.readings USING btree ("timestamp")
CREATE INDEX idx_readings_firing_id ON public.readings USING btree (firing_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_readings_firing_timestamp ON public.readings USING btree (firing_id, "timestamp")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX readings_firing_timestamp_unique ON public.readings USING btree (firing_id, "timestamp")
CREATE INDEX readings_firing_timestamp_idx ON public.readings USING btree (firing_id, "timestamp")
